columns.extraction_plan: The abstract on page 1 states: "Among 1,279 patients included in the analysis, 638 were randomly assigned to the ADT plus orteronel arm and 641 to the control arm." Table 1 on page 5, titled "Baseline Characteristics of Patients Included in the Primary Intention-To-Treat Analysis (N = 1,279)", lists "Bicalutamide (n = 641)" as the control arm. Figure A1, the CONSORT diagram on page 13, shows "ITT analysis population (n = 641) Treatment status" for the LHRHa plus bicalutamide arm. Therefore, the control arm has 641 participants.
